message.content:
Read the product specification at /home/ketan/project/flotsam/.claude/worktrees/db-schema/docs/specs/product-overview.md. I need to understand the complete database schema definition including:

1. All table definitions (users, items, mcp_clients, audit_log)
2. All enum types
3. All indexes
4. The pgvector and FTS configuration
5. Any trigger functions mentioned
6. Any constraints or relationships

Also check if there are any other spec files in docs/specs/ that might be relevant.

content.text: I'll read the product specification and check for any other relevant spec files.

content.content:
1вҶ’# Flotsam: Architecture Design & Product Overview
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’## 1. Context & Vision
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’**Flotsam** is a personal knowledge management system вҖ” a "second brain" for capturing thoughts, notes, URLs, and voice dictations, with semantic search and AI integration via MCP.
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’**Core problems it solves:**
     8вҶ’- **Capture friction**: Too many clicks to save a thought, especially on mobile/while driving
     9вҶ’- **Retrieval**: Information is scattered across Google Drive, browser bookmarks, various apps вҖ” can't find things semantically
    10вҶ’- **AI integration**: AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor) can't access personal knowledge
    11вҶ’- **Data fragmentation**: No unified place for all types of personal information
    12вҶ’- **Data control**: User owns the data end-to-end, self-hosted on VPS
    13вҶ’
    14вҶ’**MVP scope**: Browser bookmarks (Chrome extension) + voice notes (Android phone app with voice trigger for driving)
    15вҶ’
    16вҶ’**Full vision** (post-MVP): Web app with query interface, Google Drive integration, iOS app, Firefox/Safari extensions, MCP with defense-in-depth authorization, content-level access control, multi-user support.
    17вҶ’
    18вҶ’**Inspiration**: Nate B. Jones' "Open Brain" (Supabase + Slack + MCP), Obsidian (graph view, backlinks, hierarchical tags, daily notes), Readwise (capture + highlights).
    19вҶ’
    20вҶ’---
    21вҶ’
    22вҶ’## 2. Architecture Overview
    23вҶ’
    24вҶ’```
    25вҶ’                    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
    26вҶ’                    в”Ӯ                  Clients                     в”Ӯ
    27вҶ’                    в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
    28вҶ’                    в”Ӯ Chrome   в”Ӯ Android  в”Ӯ Web App  в”Ӯ AI Tools   в”Ӯ
    29вҶ’                    в”ӮExtension в”Ӯ   App    в”Ӯ (React)  в”Ӯ(via MCP)   в”Ӯ
    30вҶ’                    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
    31вҶ’                         в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
    32вҶ’                    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
    33вҶ’                    в”Ӯ              Go API Server                    в”Ӯ
    34вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ӯ
    35вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ GraphQL  в”Ӯ в”ӮREST    в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  MCP Server   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
    36вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ (gqlgen) в”Ӯ в”ӮUpload  в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  (go-sdk)     в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
    37вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в”Ӯ
    38вҶ’                    в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ             в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ
    39вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ӯ
    40вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ          Service Layer                  в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
    41вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
    42вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ӮItems в”Ӯ в”ӮSearchв”Ӯ в”ӮAuth  в”Ӯ в”ӮMCP    в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
    43вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ӮCRUD  в”Ӯ в”ӮEngineв”Ӯ в”Ӯ/RBAC в”Ӯ в”ӮAuthZ  в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
    44вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
    45вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в”Ӯ
    46вҶ’                    в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ
    47вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ӯ
    48вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ        Provider Interfaces              в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
    49вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  Embedding в”Ӯ Transcription в”Ӯ Classify   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
    50вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  (pluggable: OpenAI / local models)    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
    51вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в”Ӯ
    52вҶ’                    в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ                                     в”Ӯ
    53вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ӯ
    54вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ     Background Job Processor            в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
    55вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ     (PG-backed, async processing)       в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
    56вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в”Ӯ
    57вҶ’                    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
    58вҶ’                           в”Ӯ                          в”Ӯ
    59вҶ’                    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ            в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
    60вҶ’                    в”Ӯ PostgreSQL  в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ S3-Compatibleв”Ӯ
    61вҶ’                    в”Ӯ + pgvector  в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ   Storage    в”Ӯ
    62вҶ’                    в”Ӯ (metadata,  в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ (page HTML,  в”Ӯ
    63вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  embeddings,в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ  audio files,в”Ӯ
    64вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  FTS, jobs) в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ  documents)  в”Ӯ
    65вҶ’                    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ            в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
    66вҶ’```
    67вҶ’
    68вҶ’---
    69вҶ’
    70вҶ’## 3. Data Model
    71вҶ’
    72вҶ’### Core table: `items`
    73вҶ’
    74вҶ’Everything is an "item" вҖ” a unified type with JSONB metadata for type-specific fields.
    75вҶ’
    76вҶ’```sql
    77вҶ’CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;
    78вҶ’CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_trgm;
    79вҶ’
    80вҶ’CREATE TYPE item_type AS ENUM (
    81вҶ’  'bookmark', 'voice_note', 'text_note', 'drive_doc', 'highlight', 'file'
    82вҶ’);
    83вҶ’
    84вҶ’CREATE TYPE item_status AS ENUM (
    85вҶ’  'pending',      -- just captured, processing not complete
    86вҶ’  'processing',   -- async processing in progress
    87вҶ’  'ready',        -- fully processed, searchable
    88вҶ’  'error'         -- processing failed
    89вҶ’);
    90вҶ’
    91вҶ’CREATE TYPE sensitivity_level AS ENUM (
    92вҶ’  'public',       -- shareable, external APIs ok
    93вҶ’  'normal',       -- default, external APIs ok
    94вҶ’  'sensitive',    -- use local models, restricted MCP access
    95вҶ’  'private'       -- local models only, no MCP access
    96вҶ’);
    97вҶ’
    98вҶ’CREATE TABLE items (
    99вҶ’  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   100вҶ’  owner_id      UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
   101вҶ’  type          item_type NOT NULL,
   102вҶ’  status        item_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
   103вҶ’  sensitivity   sensitivity_level NOT NULL DEFAULT 'normal',
   104вҶ’
   105вҶ’  -- Content
   106вҶ’  title         TEXT,
   107вҶ’  content_text  TEXT,                    -- searchable text (page extract, transcription, note body)
   108вҶ’  content_url   TEXT,                    -- S3 key for large content (HTML, audio, images)
   109вҶ’
   110вҶ’  -- Search
   111вҶ’  embedding     vector(1536),            -- semantic search vector
   112вҶ’  search_vector tsvector GENERATED ALWAYS AS (
   113вҶ’    setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(title, '')), 'A') ||
   114вҶ’    setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(content_text, '')), 'B')
   115вҶ’  ) STORED,
   116вҶ’
   117вҶ’  -- Organization
   118вҶ’  tags          TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',     -- hierarchical tags: 'project/flotsam', 'person/sarah'
   119вҶ’  metadata      JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',  -- type-specific fields
   120вҶ’  auto_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',  -- LLM-extracted classification
   121вҶ’
   122вҶ’  -- Provenance
   123вҶ’  source        TEXT NOT NULL,           -- 'chrome_extension', 'android_app', 'web_app', 'mcp', 'api'
   124вҶ’  source_url    TEXT,                    -- original URL for bookmarks, referrer, etc.
   125вҶ’
   126вҶ’  -- Timestamps
   127вҶ’  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
   128вҶ’  updated_at    TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
   129вҶ’  captured_at   TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  -- when user actually captured (may differ from created_at)
   130вҶ’);
   131вҶ’
   132вҶ’-- Indexes
   133вҶ’CREATE INDEX idx_items_owner ON items(owner_id);
   134вҶ’CREATE INDEX idx_items_type ON items(owner_id, type);
   135вҶ’CREATE INDEX idx_items_created ON items(owner_id, created_at DESC);
   136вҶ’CREATE INDEX idx_items_tags ON items USING GIN(tags);
   137вҶ’CREATE INDEX idx_items_metadata ON items USING GIN(metadata);
   138вҶ’CREATE INDEX idx_items_search ON items USING GIN(search_vector);
   139вҶ’CREATE INDEX idx_items_embedding ON items USING ivfflat(embedding vector_cosine_ops) WITH (lists = 100);
   140вҶ’CREATE INDEX idx_items_sensitivity ON items(owner_id, sensitivity);
   141вҶ’```
   142вҶ’
   143вҶ’### Type-specific metadata examples
   144вҶ’
   145вҶ’**Bookmark** (`metadata`):
   146вҶ’```json
   147вҶ’{
   148вҶ’  "url": "https://example.com/article",
   149вҶ’  "referrer": "https://news.ycombinator.com",
   150вҶ’  "selection": "The key insight is that...",
   151вҶ’  "page_title": "Article Title",
   152вҶ’  "favicon_url": "https://example.com/favicon.ico",
   153вҶ’  "content_type": "article"
   154вҶ’}
   155вҶ’```
   156вҶ’
   157вҶ’**Voice note** (`metadata`):
   158вҶ’```json
   159вҶ’{
   160вҶ’  "duration_seconds": 45,
   161вҶ’  "audio_format": "webm",
   162вҶ’  "transcription_provider": "whisper-local",
   163вҶ’  "device": "Pixel 8",
   164вҶ’  "language": "en"
   165вҶ’}
   166вҶ’```
   167вҶ’
   168вҶ’**Auto-extracted metadata** (`auto_metadata`):
   169вҶ’```json
   170вҶ’{
   171вҶ’  "category": "career",
   172вҶ’  "people": ["Sarah"],
   173вҶ’  "action_items": ["Follow up with Sarah about consulting"],
   174вҶ’  "sentiment": "neutral",
   175вҶ’  "topics": ["career-change", "consulting"],
   176вҶ’  "sensitivity_suggestion": "normal"
   177вҶ’}
   178вҶ’```
   179вҶ’
   180вҶ’### Users table
   181вҶ’
   182вҶ’```sql
   183вҶ’CREATE TABLE users (
   184вҶ’  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   185вҶ’  email         TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
   186вҶ’  display_name  TEXT,
   187вҶ’  password_hash TEXT,                    -- bcrypt, nullable if using external auth
   188вҶ’  auth_provider TEXT DEFAULT 'local',    -- 'local', 'google', 'github'
   189вҶ’  auth_subject  TEXT,                    -- external provider subject ID
   190вҶ’  settings      JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
   191вҶ’  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
   192вҶ’  updated_at    TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
   193вҶ’);
   194вҶ’```
   195вҶ’
   196вҶ’### MCP client registry
   197вҶ’
   198вҶ’```sql
   199вҶ’CREATE TABLE mcp_clients (
   200вҶ’  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   201вҶ’  owner_id      UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
   202вҶ’  name          TEXT NOT NULL,           -- 'Claude Desktop', 'Cursor', 'ChatGPT'
   203вҶ’  api_key_hash  TEXT NOT NULL,           -- bcrypt hash of client API key
   204вҶ’  permissions   JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',  -- allowed tools, sensitivity levels
   205вҶ’  -- e.g.: {"tools": ["search", "browse", "capture"], "max_sensitivity": "normal"}
   206вҶ’  requires_approval TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}', -- operations requiring human approval
   207вҶ’  -- e.g.: ["delete", "update_sensitivity", "export"]
   208вҶ’  active        BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
   209вҶ’  last_used_at  TIMESTAMPTZ,
   210вҶ’  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
   211вҶ’);
   212вҶ’```
   213вҶ’
   214вҶ’### Audit log (for MCP accountability)
   215вҶ’
   216вҶ’```sql
   217вҶ’CREATE TABLE audit_log (
   218вҶ’  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   219вҶ’  user_id       UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
   220вҶ’  client_id     UUID REFERENCES mcp_clients(id),
   221вҶ’  action        TEXT NOT NULL,           -- 'search', 'read', 'create', 'update', 'delete'
   222вҶ’  resource_type TEXT,                    -- 'item', 'user', 'mcp_client'
   223вҶ’  resource_id   UUID,
   224вҶ’  request       JSONB,                   -- sanitized request details
   225вҶ’  response_summary JSONB,               -- summary of what was returned/changed
   226вҶ’  approved      BOOLEAN,                -- null if no approval needed, true/false otherwise
   227вҶ’  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
   228вҶ’);
   229вҶ’```
   230вҶ’
   231вҶ’---
   232вҶ’
   233вҶ’## 4. API Design
   234вҶ’
   235вҶ’### GraphQL Schema (core types)
   236вҶ’
   237вҶ’```graphql
   238вҶ’type Item {
   239вҶ’  id: ID!
   240вҶ’  type: ItemType!
   241вҶ’  status: ItemStatus!
   242вҶ’  sensitivity: SensitivityLevel!
   243вҶ’  title: String
   244вҶ’  contentText: String
   245вҶ’  contentUrl: String
   246вҶ’  tags: [String!]!
   247вҶ’  metadata: JSON!
   248вҶ’  autoMetadata: JSON!
   249вҶ’  source: String!
   250вҶ’  sourceUrl: String
   251вҶ’  createdAt: DateTime!
   252вҶ’  updatedAt: DateTime!
   253вҶ’  capturedAt: DateTime!
   254вҶ’}
   255вҶ’
   256вҶ’enum ItemType { BOOKMARK, VOICE_NOTE, TEXT_NOTE, DRIVE_DOC, HIGHLIGHT, FILE }
   257вҶ’enum ItemStatus { PENDING, PROCESSING, READY, ERROR }
   258вҶ’enum SensitivityLevel { PUBLIC, NORMAL, SENSITIVE, PRIVATE }
   259вҶ’
   260вҶ’type SearchResult {
   261вҶ’  items: [Item!]!
   262вҶ’  total: Int!
   263вҶ’  hasMore: Boolean!
   264вҶ’}
   265вҶ’
   266вҶ’type Query {
   267вҶ’  item(id: ID!): Item
   268вҶ’  items(filter: ItemFilter, limit: Int, offset: Int, sort: ItemSort): SearchResult!
   269вҶ’  search(query: String!, filter: ItemFilter, limit: Int, threshold: Float): SearchResult!
   270вҶ’  me: User!
   271вҶ’}
   272вҶ’
   273вҶ’type Mutation {
   274вҶ’  captureBookmark(input: BookmarkInput!): Item!
   275вҶ’  captureNote(input: NoteInput!): Item!
   276вҶ’  updateItem(id: ID!, input: UpdateItemInput!): Item!
   277вҶ’  deleteItem(id: ID!): Boolean!
   278вҶ’  updateSensitivity(id: ID!, sensitivity: SensitivityLevel!): Item!
   279вҶ’  tagItem(id: ID!, tags: [String!]!): Item!
   280вҶ’}
   281вҶ’
   282вҶ’input BookmarkInput {
   283вҶ’  url: String!
   284вҶ’  title: String
   285вҶ’  selection: String
   286вҶ’  referrer: String
   287вҶ’  tags: [String!]
   288вҶ’  sensitivity: SensitivityLevel
   289вҶ’}
   290вҶ’
   291вҶ’input ItemFilter {
   292вҶ’  types: [ItemType!]
   293вҶ’  tags: [String!]
   294вҶ’  sensitivity: [SensitivityLevel!]
   295вҶ’  source: String
   296вҶ’  dateFrom: DateTime
   297вҶ’  dateTo: DateTime
   298вҶ’  status: [ItemStatus!]
   299вҶ’}
   300вҶ’```
   301вҶ’
   302вҶ’### REST Endpoints
   303вҶ’
   304вҶ’| Method | Path | Purpose |
   305вҶ’|--------|------|---------|
   306вҶ’| POST | `/upload` | Multipart file upload (audio, images) вҶ’ returns S3 URL |
   307вҶ’| GET | `/health` | Health check + version |
   308вҶ’| * | `/graphql` | GraphQL endpoint |
   309вҶ’| GET | `/playground` | GraphQL Playground (dev only) |
   310вҶ’| * | `/mcp` | MCP streamable HTTP |
   311вҶ’
   312вҶ’---
   313вҶ’
   314вҶ’## 5. Auth & Authorization Architecture
   315вҶ’
   316вҶ’### Authentication flow
   317вҶ’
   318вҶ’1. **Web app**: Email/password login вҶ’ JWT (access + refresh tokens)
   319вҶ’2. **Chrome extension**: User logs in via web app, extension gets token via `chrome.identity` or manual paste
   320вҶ’3. **Android app**: Email/password вҶ’ JWT
   321вҶ’4. **MCP clients**: Per-client API keys (registered in web UI)
   322вҶ’5. **API direct**: Bearer JWT or API key
   323вҶ’
   324вҶ’### JWT claims
   325вҶ’
   326вҶ’```go
   327вҶ’type Claims struct {
   328вҶ’    jwt.RegisteredClaims
   329вҶ’    UserID     uuid.UUID `json:"uid"`
   330вҶ’    Email      string    `json:"email"`
   331вҶ’    ClientType string    `json:"ctype"` // "web", "extension", "mobile", "api"
   332вҶ’}
   333вҶ’```
   334вҶ’
   335вҶ’### Authorization model
   336вҶ’
   337вҶ’Multi-tenant from day 1:
   338вҶ’- Every item has `owner_id`
   339вҶ’- All queries filter by authenticated user's ID
   340вҶ’- Row-level security in PostgreSQL as defense-in-depth
   341вҶ’- RBAC columns in users table for future multi-user scenarios
   342вҶ’
   343вҶ’---
   344вҶ’
   345вҶ’## 6. MCP Authorization Model
   346вҶ’
   347вҶ’Defense-in-depth with three layers:
   348вҶ’
   349вҶ’### Layer 1: Per-client tool permissions
   350вҶ’
   351вҶ’Each MCP client has an allowlist of tools and maximum sensitivity level:
   352вҶ’```json
   353вҶ’{
   354вҶ’  "tools": ["search", "browse", "capture"],
   355вҶ’  "max_sensitivity": "normal",
   356вҶ’  "read_only": false
   357вҶ’}
   358вҶ’```
   359вҶ’
   360вҶ’### Layer 2: Human-in-the-loop approval
   361вҶ’
   362вҶ’Certain operations require real-time user approval:
   363вҶ’- Configured per-client in `requires_approval` array
   364вҶ’- When triggered: request is held, push notification sent to user's device
   365вҶ’- User approves/denies via web app or mobile app
   366вҶ’- Timeout after configurable period (default: 5 minutes) вҶ’ deny
   367вҶ’
   368вҶ’### Layer 3: Content-level filtering
   369вҶ’
   370вҶ’- Items with `sensitivity = 'private'` are never returned via MCP
   371вҶ’- Items with `sensitivity = 'sensitive'` only returned to clients with `max_sensitivity >= 'sensitive'`
   372вҶ’- Auto-classification suggests sensitivity on capture; user can override
   373вҶ’- Audit log records every MCP access for accountability
   374вҶ’
   375вҶ’---
   376вҶ’
   377вҶ’## 7. Content Processing Pipeline
   378вҶ’
   379вҶ’### Sync operations (block API response)
   380вҶ’- Text embedding generation (< 1s for short content)
   381вҶ’- Tag extraction from metadata
   382вҶ’- Input validation
   383вҶ’
   384вҶ’### Async operations (background jobs)
   385вҶ’- Page content fetching for bookmarks (fetch URL, extract readable content)
   386вҶ’- Audio transcription (Whisper API or local)
   387вҶ’- Auto-metadata extraction (LLM classification)
   388вҶ’- Sensitivity auto-classification
   389вҶ’- Large content upload to S3
   390вҶ’- Re-embedding after content changes
   391вҶ’
   392вҶ’### Job processing
   393вҶ’
   394вҶ’PostgreSQL-backed job queue (River):
   395вҶ’- Jobs stored in PG (no new infrastructure)
   396вҶ’- Retries with exponential backoff
   397вҶ’- Dead letter queue for failed jobs
   398вҶ’- Status tracking (items move from `pending` вҶ’ `processing` вҶ’ `ready` / `error`)
   399вҶ’
   400вҶ’---
   401вҶ’
   402вҶ’## 8. Storage Architecture
   403вҶ’
   404вҶ’### PostgreSQL (structured data + search)
   405вҶ’- Item metadata, user data, MCP client registry, audit log
   406вҶ’- pgvector embeddings for semantic search
   407вҶ’- Full-text search indexes
   408вҶ’- Background job queue (River)
   409вҶ’- Managed via goose migrations
   410вҶ’
   411вҶ’### S3-Compatible Object Storage (large content)
   412вҶ’- Development: MinIO in Docker
   413вҶ’- Production: Cloudflare R2 (S3-compatible, no egress fees)
   414вҶ’- Stores: page HTML/content, audio files, images, document snapshots
   415вҶ’- Items reference S3 objects via `content_url` column
   416вҶ’
   417вҶ’### Key hierarchy
   418вҶ’```
   419вҶ’s3://flotsam-{env}/
   420вҶ’  {owner_id}/
   421вҶ’    bookmarks/{item_id}/content.html
   422вҶ’    voice_notes/{item_id}/audio.webm
   423вҶ’    voice_notes/{item_id}/audio.mp3
   424вҶ’    files/{item_id}/{filename}
   425вҶ’```
   426вҶ’
   427вҶ’---
   428вҶ’
   429вҶ’## 9. Provider Abstraction
   430вҶ’
   431вҶ’Pluggable interfaces for AI services, with local fallback for sensitive content:
   432вҶ’
   433вҶ’```go
   434вҶ’type EmbeddingProvider interface {
   435вҶ’    Embed(ctx context.Context, text string) ([]float32, error)
   436вҶ’    EmbedBatch(ctx context.Context, texts []string) ([][]float32, error)
   437вҶ’    Dimensions() int
   438вҶ’}
   439вҶ’
   440вҶ’type TranscriptionProvider interface {
   441вҶ’    Transcribe(ctx context.Context, audio io.Reader, opts TranscribeOpts) (string, error)
   442вҶ’}
   443вҶ’
   444вҶ’type ClassificationProvider interface {
   445вҶ’    Classify(ctx context.Context, content string) (*Classification, error)
   446вҶ’}
   447вҶ’```
   448вҶ’
   449вҶ’**Implementations:**
   450вҶ’| Provider | Embedding | Transcription | Classification |
   451вҶ’|----------|-----------|---------------|----------------|
   452вҶ’| OpenAI | text-embedding-3-small (1536d) | Whisper API | gpt-4o-mini |
   453вҶ’| Local | nomic-embed-text via Ollama | whisper.cpp | llama via Ollama |
   454вҶ’
   455вҶ’**Routing logic**: If item sensitivity >= `sensitive`, use local providers. Otherwise, use configured default (OpenAI).
   456вҶ’
   457вҶ’---
   458вҶ’
   459вҶ’## 10. Ideas Stolen from Obsidian
   460вҶ’
   461вҶ’- **Hierarchical tags**: `project/flotsam`, `person/sarah`, `topic/career` вҖ” not flat tags
   462вҶ’- **Backlinks**: When a bookmark references another captured URL, create a link. Surface "what links to this" in the UI.
   463вҶ’- **Daily digest**: Auto-generated summary of items captured each day
   464вҶ’- **Graph view** (future): Visualize connections between items based on shared tags, backlinks, semantic similarity
   465вҶ’- **Quick capture**: Obsidian's "quick add" pattern вҖ” minimal friction to save a thought
   466вҶ’
   467вҶ’---
   468вҶ’
   469вҶ’## 11. Technology Choices
   470вҶ’
   471вҶ’### Core
   472вҶ’| Component | Technology | Why |
   473вҶ’|-----------|-----------|-----|
   474вҶ’| API framework | Go + chi/v5 | Composable middleware, stdlib-compatible |
   475вҶ’| GraphQL | gqlgen (schema-first) | Type-safe codegen, SDL source of truth |
   476вҶ’| Database driver | pgx/v5 + pgxpool | Native PostgreSQL, connection pooling |
   477вҶ’| Migrations | goose/v3 (embedded) | SQL-based, up/down, embedded in binary |
   478вҶ’| JWT | golang-jwt/v5 | HS256 + RS256 support |
   479вҶ’| Config | caarlos0/env | Struct-tag env var binding |
   480вҶ’| Logging | log/slog (stdlib) | Structured, leveled |
   481вҶ’| MCP | modelcontextprotocol/go-sdk | Official Go MCP SDK |
   482вҶ’| Background jobs | River (riverqueue/river) | PG-backed, Go-native, integrates with pgx |
   483вҶ’| S3 client | aws-sdk-go-v2 | S3-compatible API (works with R2, MinIO) |
   484вҶ’| Password hashing | golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt | Standard library |
   485вҶ’| HTTP client (page fetch) | go-readability | Extract readable content from HTML |
   486вҶ’| Vector search | pgvector (via pgx) | No additional infrastructure |
   487вҶ’
   488вҶ’### Frontend
   489вҶ’| Component | Technology |
   490вҶ’|-----------|-----------|
   491вҶ’| Build | Vite 5 |
   492вҶ’| Framework | React 18 + TypeScript 5 |
   493вҶ’| UI | Mantine 7 |
   494вҶ’| GraphQL client | urql + gql.tada |
   495вҶ’| State | Zustand 5 |
   496вҶ’| Forms | React Hook Form + Zod |
   497вҶ’| Testing | Vitest + Playwright |
   498вҶ’
   499вҶ’### Chrome Extension
   500вҶ’| Component | Technology |
   501вҶ’|-----------|-----------|
   502вҶ’| Manifest | V3 |
   503вҶ’| UI | React |
   504вҶ’| Communication | Chrome Extension APIs + GraphQL mutations to API |
   505вҶ’
   506вҶ’### Android App (MVP)
   507вҶ’| Component | Technology |
   508вҶ’|-----------|-----------|
   509вҶ’| Framework | TBD (Kotlin/Jetpack Compose vs React Native vs Flutter) |
   510вҶ’| Voice | Android SpeechRecognizer or Google Speech API |
   511вҶ’| Trigger | "Hey Google" routine, notification quick-action, or widget |
   512вҶ’

content.text:
Perfect! I've read the product specification. Based on the document, here's the complete database schema definition:

## Complete Database Schema Definition

### Enums

**item_type:**
- `bookmark`, `voice_note`, `text_note`, `drive_doc`, `highlight`, `file`

**item_status:**
- `pending` вҖ” just captured, processing not complete
- `processing` вҖ” async processing in progress
- `ready` вҖ” fully processed, searchable
- `error` вҖ” processing failed

**sensitivity_level:**
- `public` вҖ” shareable, external APIs ok
- `normal` вҖ” default, external APIs ok
- `sensitive` вҖ” use local models, restricted MCP access
- `private` вҖ” local models only, no MCP access

---

### Core Tables

**items** (primary table for unified content)
- `id` UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
- `owner_id` UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id)
- `type` item_type NOT NULL
- `status` item_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'
- `sensitivity` sensitivity_level NOT NULL DEFAULT 'normal'
- `title` TEXT
- `content_text` TEXT (searchable text: page extract, transcription, note body)
- `content_url` TEXT (S3 key for large content)
- `embedding` vector(1536) (pgvector for semantic search)
- `search_vector` tsvector GENERATED ALWAYS AS (weighted combination of title + content_text) STORED
- `tags` TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}' (hierarchical tags: 'project/flotsam', 'person/sarah')
- `metadata` JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}' (type-specific fields)
- `auto_metadata` JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}' (LLM-extracted classification)
- `source` TEXT NOT NULL ('chrome_extension', 'android_app', 'web_app', 'mcp', 'api')
- `source_url` TEXT
- `created_at` TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
- `updated_at` TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
- `captured_at` TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now() (when user actually captured)

**items Indexes:**
- `idx_items_owner` ON items(owner_id)
- `idx_items_type` ON items(owner_id, type)
- `idx_items_created` ON items(owner_id, created_at DESC)
- `idx_items_tags` USING GIN(tags)
- `idx_items_metadata` USING GIN(metadata)
- `idx_items_search` USING GIN(search_vector)
- `idx_items_embedding` USING ivfflat(embedding vector_cosine_ops) WITH (lists = 100)
- `idx_items_sensitivity` ON items(owner_id, sensitivity)

---

**users**
- `id` UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
- `email` TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL
- `display_name` TEXT
- `password_hash` TEXT (bcrypt, nullable if using external auth)
- `auth_provider` TEXT DEFAULT 'local' ('local', 'google', 'github')
- `auth_subject` TEXT (external provider subject ID)
- `settings` JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'
- `created_at` TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
- `updated_at` TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()

---

**mcp_clients** (MCP client registry)
- `id` UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
- `owner_id` UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id)
- `name` TEXT NOT NULL ('Claude Desktop', 'Cursor', 'ChatGPT')
- `api_key_hash` TEXT NOT NULL (bcrypt hash of client API key)
- `permissions` JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}' (e.g., `{"tools": ["search", "browse", "capture"], "max_sensitivity": "normal"}`)
- `requires_approval` TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}' (operations requiring human approval, e.g., `["delete", "update_sensitivity", "export"]`)
- `active` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true
- `last_used_at` TIMESTAMPTZ
- `created_at` TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()

---

**audit_log** (for MCP accountability)
- `id` UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
- `user_id` UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id)
- `client_id` UUID REFERENCES mcp_clients(id)
- `action` TEXT NOT NULL ('search', 'read', 'create', 'update', 'delete')
- `resource_type` TEXT ('item', 'user', 'mcp_client')
- `resource_id` UUID
- `request` JSONB (sanitized request details)
- `response_summary` JSONB (summary of what was returned/changed)
- `approved` BOOLEAN (null if no approval needed, true/false otherwise)
- `created_at` TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()

---

### Type-Specific Metadata Examples

**Bookmark** (metadata field):
```json
{
  "url": "https://example.com/article",
  "referrer": "https://news.ycombinator.com",
  "selection": "The key insight is that...",
  "page_title": "Article Title",
  "favicon_url": "https://example.com/favicon.ico",
  "content_type": "article"
}
```

**Voice Note** (metadata field):
```json
{
  "duration_seconds": 45,
  "audio_format": "webm",
  "transcription_provider": "whisper-local",
  "device": "Pixel 8",
  "language": "en"
}
```

**Auto-extracted Metadata** (auto_metadata field):
```json
{
  "category": "career",
  "people": ["Sarah"],
  "action_items": ["Follow up with Sarah about consulting"],
  "sentiment": "neutral",
  "topics": ["career-change", "consulting"],
  "sensitivity_suggestion": "normal"
}
```

---

### PostgreSQL Extensions Required

```sql
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_trgm;
```

---

### Key Features

1. **pgvector integration**: Embeddings stored as vector(1536) with ivfflat index for fast similarity search
2. **Full-text search**: Generated `search_vector` tsvector with weighted title/content fields and GIN index
3. **Multi-tenant**: Every item has `owner_id`; all queries filter by authenticated user
4. **Content sensitivity**: Three-layer authorization (per-client permissions, human-in-the-loop approval, content-level filtering)
5. **S3 storage**: Large content referenced via `content_url` (S3 keys follow pattern: `{owner_id}/{type}/{item_id}/{filename}`)
6. **Background jobs**: Via River (stored in separate tables managed by River itself)
7. **Provenance tracking**: `source`, `source_url`, `captured_at` distinguish when/how items were captured

---

### Spec Files Located

Only one spec file exists in `/home/ketan/project/flotsam/.claude/worktrees/db-schema/docs/specs/`:
- **product-overview.md** вҖ” Contains complete architecture, data model, API design, auth, MCP, and tech choices

This single specification file is the authoritative source for the entire system design.
